visuals.title: AI > Machine Learning > Deep Learning
visuals.description: Nested circles showing deep learning as a subset of machine learning, which is a subset of artificial intelligence.

visuals.title: Hierarchical Feature Learning
visuals.description: Shows how raw pixels transform through layers into edges, textures, parts, and finally objects.

visuals.title: Deep Learning Milestones
visuals.description: Timeline from 1943 McCulloch-Pitts neuron to modern transformers and LLMs.
